observed_anomaly_cues: Visual pattern suggesting deformed capsule shape
Localized deviation from normal capsule appearance
mechanism_explanation: Excessive compressive force deforms the part beyond its elastic limit.

corrective_action: Reduce compression force and verify press calibration.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the deformed capsule shape would be absent and surface appears normal.
